 920 | object AppCache {
 921 |     var cachedApps: List<AppItem> = emptyList()
 922 |     private var lastPackageCount: Int = -1
 923 | 
 924 |     fun getApps(ctx: Context): List<AppItem> {
 925 |         val pm = ctx.packageManager
 926 |         val intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_MAIN, null).apply { addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_LAUNCHER) }
 927 |         val resolveInfos = pm.queryIntentActivities(intent, 0)
 928 |         
 929 |         // Dynamic & Reliable: Return instantly if installed app count hasn't changed
 930 |         if (cachedApps.isNotEmpty() && resolveInfos.size == lastPackageCount) {
 931 |             return cachedApps
 932 |         }
 933 |         
 934 |         lastPackageCount = resolveInfos.size
 935 |         val newApps = resolveInfos.distinctBy { it.activityInfo.packageName }.map { resolveInfo ->
 936 |             val pkg = resolveInfo.activityInfo.packageName
 937 |             val name = resolveInfo.loadLabel(pm).toString()
 938 |             val isSystem = (resolveInfo.activityInfo.applicationInfo.flags and android.content.pm.ApplicationInfo.FLAG_SYSTEM) != 0
 939 |             val drawable = resolveInfo.loadIcon(pm)
 940 |             val bitmap = drawableToBitmap(drawable)
 941 |             AppItem(name, pkg, bitmap.asImageBitmap(), isSystem)
 942 |         }.sortedBy { it.name }
 943 |         
 944 |         cachedApps = newApps
 945 |         return newApps
 946 |     }
 947 | }

 949 | fun drawableToBitmap(drawable: Drawable): Bitmap {
 950 |     val size = 150
 951 |     val bitmap = Bitmap.createBitmap(size, size, Bitmap.Config.ARGB_8888)
 952 |     val canvas = Canvas(bitmap)
 953 |     drawable.setBounds(0, 0, size, size)
 954 |     drawable.draw(canvas)
 955 |     return bitmap
 956 | }

 963 |             ctx.startActivity(intent)
 964 |         }
 965 |     } catch (e: Exception) {}
